channel.title: Almost Surely on Ritvik Teegavarapu
channel.description: Recent content in Almost Surely on Ritvik Teegavarapu

item.title: Normally Distributed
item.description: As usual, I was doomscrolling through Instagram when I came across a clip from a TV show called Normal People. It was one of the more interesting 1-minute tidbits I had seen, and I was looking to get into a more serious but non-committal show, and as it would turn out, this show was a 12-episode mini-series that received universal acclaim. I sat down and decided to binge this show, and it truly surprised me how much I needed this show at this moment. Spoilers ahead!
